code_prompt_defaults.object_description: an outer square ABCD dissected into four congruent right triangles around square EFGH, with one side split into two labeled segments
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "E", "F", "G", and "H"; each value must be the pixel point [x,y] for that labeled vertex
